str_20BC554F: With slow, measured steps, I arrived at the club doors.
str_DC5CAD14: There was a slight haze before my eyes.
str_C5C7AF31: My cottony legs buckled with every new step.
str_BD9F0712: The music slowly began to penetrate my head, flutter along my nerves, and pulsate in my temples.
str_C0D8550B: No one was around, and I was overcome with wild fear.
str_4DE85807: As if my entire past life had come to an end.
str_EFC86709: It all began here, and here it will end.
str_67863A41: I entered the club, and the spotlights cast (or threw, or plunged?) me into an abyss of despair.
str_83EA040A: Police officers met me at the club.
str_3CC0186A: I saw Charles Garcia. And in his eyes, I read disappointment.
str_FDA3ACA4: Alice, you are under arrest for murder.
str_3CD54678: You have the right to remain silent. Anything you say can and will be used against you in court. You have the right to an attorney during questioning. If you cannot afford an attorney, one will be provided for you by the state.
str_FECD3641: My hands were bound in handcuffs.
str_A888E49B: Hands that were covered in blood.
str_EAA738BD: Charles was already waiting for me at the club.
str_487C54D0: Alice, I have orders to arrest you.
str_E4753694: You're covered in blood. The police already know about it!
str_259E2EF8: How could you do this? I could have helped you, but not now.
str_9A228685: If you love me, then you won't hand me over to them.
str_E4C0C16A: Earlier, you decided that you would take the opportunity to manipulate Charles.
str_C9489C2F: I approached Charles and touched his face with my hands, pulling him towards me for a passionate kiss.
str_C430D97F: He looked at me with puppy-dog eyes, and I understood: he would do whatever I wanted.
str_687ACF54: And now it's time to run, we don't have much time.
str_E5059C6F: Edwin met me at the entrance to the club.
str_1B166482: Alice, the police are here. They want to take you into custody.
str_5C6D5C19: You need to run, I'll hold them off. I don't want you to spend your whole life behind bars.
str_E27F3154: I had to run. And I did it.
str_2467B982: Edwin shoved a cardboard box into my hands...
str_BA3BC609: The box contained money. It should have been enough to escape. To disappear from this damn city.
str_C3832D09: I ran further down the street and got into the first taxi I saw.
str_B3AE18CF: I can't run from this, from myself.
str_DC98D206: I looked sadly at Edwin and walked on.
str_FFD9D2FD: Alice, I managed to convince the police not to arrest you.
str_2A181B8E: I don't know what will happen next, but for now, you're free.
str_849B0DD1: I approached Charles and gently wrapped my arms around his torso.
str_74EA41CC: He helped me, and that's what matters most now.
str_201C09DD: You provided enough information for Mark to be considered a suspect.
str_A22CA92D: I don't know what will happen next, but for now, you're free. And Mark has now become the main suspect.
str_62073D4C: Alice, you are under arrest for the murder of Miranda.
str_CEA1704C: And also for the murder of Tom Emmit.
